headline: Regeneron: 'Buy' Revenue Growth And Two Extensive Drug Development Opportunities
summary: Regeneron's EYLEA HD US sales surged 52% in Q1 2026, offsetting competitive pressures and patient switching within the EYLEA franchise. See why REGN is a Buy.
